features.featureTitle: Build an admin panel page (accessible only to Jourdain Rodriguez) that shows: (1) a list of all moderators with their status and a 'Ban Moderator' action button for active moderators; (2) a list of all pending moderator reports with reporter info, reason, and 'Ban Moderator' / 'Dismiss' action buttons; (3) a list of all pending ban appeals with user info, appeal text, and 'Approve Appeal' / 'Deny Appeal' action buttons.

Build a moderator dashboard page (accessible only to active, non-banned moderators) that shows: (1) a searchable list of all users with their current status (active/warned/banned) and warning count; (2) per-user action buttons: 'Issue Warning' (with a reason input), 'Ban User' (with a reason input), and 'Instant Ban for Pornographic Content' (one-click, no extra input); (3) a disabled/greyed-out state for all action buttons if the moderator is banned.

Build a user-facing status page where a user can: (1) see if they are banned and the reason; (2) submit a ban appeal with a text message if no appeal is currently pending; (3) view their current appeal status (none / pending / approved / denied); (4) view their list of received warnings with reasons and timestamps; (5) report a moderator (with a reason text field) if they have received at least one warning — this submits a moderator report to the admin.

Apply a bold, dark-themed visual design across the entire app: deep charcoal/near-black backgrounds, high-contrast accent color (e.g., red-orange for destructive actions, teal/green for approvals), clean sans-serif typography, card-based layout for lists and panels, and clear visual hierarchy that communicates authority and safety for a moderation context.
